Video.summary: The laziest husband and wife lie about their child in order to get support from a woman who believes the child is her grandchild.
Video.title: He's Not Your Son

Image.alt: He's Not Your Son
He's Not Your Son
He's Not Your Son

Video.summary: Robert believes his daughter is being abused and molested by her stepfather, John, but John and Tiffany denies any abuse. Is Tiffany covering for John’s abuse? See the shocking lie detector test today!
Video.title: A Father's Fight for His Daughter

Image.alt: A Father's Fight for His Daughter
A Father's Fight for His Daughter
A Father's Fight for His Daughter

Video.summary: Robert says he believes that his daughters mother has been abusing her and he wants to prove the abuse and gain full custody of his daughter. Then, Casey claims her ex-boyfriend is abusive towards their kids and she wants him out of their lives.
Video.title: I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child

Image.alt: I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child
I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child
I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child

Video.summary: Victoria says Dewayne harasses her, calls her horrible names and is physically abusive toward her; wedding plans are on hold until Trenell can pass a lie detector test.
Video.title: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?

Image.alt: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?

Video.summary: Eric finally won custody of her daughter and suspects his ex Brittney of neglecting her! He suspects Brittney’s boyfriend Freddy of molesting her and knows that his daughter tested positive for meth! But what will the lie detector results reveal?
Video.title: This Child Was Living in Hell

Image.alt: This Child Was Living in Hell
This Child Was Living in Hell
This Child Was Living in Hell

Video.summary: Gloria thinks her sister's apparent drug-overdose death was not an accident, and that her other sister may be responsible.
Video.title: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Video.summary: Melinda says that she should be given custody of Tiffany's son because Tiffany is allowing her boyfriends to physically abuse the boy. Tiffany swears that the abuse Is coming from the boys father Scott and not from her boyfriends.
Video.title: Results Reveal The Truth

Image.alt: Results Reveal The Truth
Results Reveal The Truth
Results Reveal The Truth

Video.summary: A couple's children are taken away after the six-month-old nearly dies from having a baby wipe lodged in her windpipe; Shawn says his daughter came home with severe bruising on her body after staying with her mother and told him her mother beat her.
Video.title: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

Image.alt: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

Video.summary: A sisters nightmare ... 11-year-old Ana is terrified of older brother Ray who's regularly beat her since she was just five years old. Ana's fears have grown so much, she fears for her life every night when she goes to bed. While Ray is only 13, his on-stage behavior reveals his true colors, and shocks even Steve. With Ana's mother out of solutions, it's up to Steve and past guest Gary, to show Ray a better path in life and help Ana.
Video.title: My Big Brother Beats Me

Image.alt: My Big Brother Beats Me
My Big Brother Beats Me
My Big Brother Beats Me

Video.summary: On August 5th, Amber’s 7 month old daughter was taken by police after cigarette burns were found all over her body. Amber’s mother, Vickie, found the burns and called the police, but who actually burned her?
Video.title: 4 Suspects: Who Will Fall?

Image.alt: 4 Suspects: Who Will Fall?
4 Suspects: Who Will Fall?
4 Suspects: Who Will Fall?

Video.summary: Jayshanice suspects her physically abusive boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Scared to Death

Image.alt: Scared to Death
Scared to Death
Scared to Death

Video.summary: Ashley believes her husband Michael may have molested their 3 year old son. Michael says she is making up this entire story so she can divorce him. Next, Anjail believes Dwight has been physically abusing their son.
Video.title: He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends

Image.alt: He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends
He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends
He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends

Video.summary: Steve gives an update on whether jail was a wake-up call for Stephanie and Maribel’s out of control daughters.
Video.title: Teen Girls Go to Jail Part 2

Image.alt: Teen Girls Go to Jail Part 2
Teen Girls Go to Jail Part 2
Teen Girls Go to Jail Part 2

Video.summary: Danny has accused Missy of infidelity, but she wants a lie detector test to silence him today!
Video.title: Does She Have a Double Life?

Image.alt: Does She Have a Double Life?
Does She Have a Double Life?
Does She Have a Double Life?

Video.summary: Josephine's family was ripped apart after her boyfriend Mark was accused of molestation. Her son, Anthony and his girlfriend, Renee believe Mark molested their 2 year old son. But Mark believes that Renee coached her son to say this!
Video.title: I Believe My Son!

Image.alt: I Believe My Son!
I Believe My Son!
I Believe My Son!

Video.summary: Maria is convinced that her son’s ex-girlfriend Amy and her new boyfriend Brian are abusing and neglecting her granddaughter. But Amy says that Maria is racist and angry because her granddaughter is being raised in a Hispanic household
Video.title: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?

Image.alt: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?
Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?
Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?

Video.summary: Jessica just recently got married to Gian after a five month relationship. With a baby now on the way!
Video.title: I Have Two Husbands

Image.alt: I Have Two Husbands
I Have Two Husbands
I Have Two Husbands

Video.summary: Robert believes his wife may have faked her pregnancy and the miscarriage just to keep him around!
Video.title: Our Love Is Torture

Image.alt: Our Love Is Torture
Our Love Is Torture
Our Love Is Torture

Video.summary: Kerenina and Clay have a four-month-old son, but Clay cannot deny his suspicions that the child might actually have been fathered by their 71 year old roommate, William.
Video.title: Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?

Image.alt: Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?
Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?
Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?

Video.summary: Brandi and Marty have been together 5 years. Brandi's brother and her mother claim that Marty is being physically abusive and has been cheating. Plus, Jessica worries that Derwin is now cheating on her and claims that he's been abusive towards her.
Video.title: Steve, I'm Not An Abuser

Image.alt: Steve, I'm Not An Abuser
Steve, I'm Not An Abuser
Steve, I'm Not An Abuser

Video.summary: Today, Steve's helping Portia find her voice after a wild car chase, losing her leg, and ending up in a coma.
Video.title: Crawl to Your Wife

Image.alt: Crawl to Your Wife
Crawl to Your Wife
Crawl to Your Wife

Video.summary: Shalonda tells her mom she's ready for a baby! Can Steve figure out what Shalonda's really up to?
Video.title: I'm 14 and I Want a Baby

Image.alt: I'm 14 and I Want a Baby
I'm 14 and I Want a Baby
I'm 14 and I Want a Baby

Video.summary: Shannan claims Tim fathered her child. He doesn’t buy it because he doesn’t recall having sex with her!
Video.title: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did

Image.alt: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did

Video.summary: A woman whose fiancé tried to strangle her still believes he is a good guy; a teen who has lived a life of crime finds her younger sister following in her footsteps and wants to stop her.
Video.title: Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence

Image.alt: Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence
Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence
Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence

Video.summary: Kandie was the guardian of Katie’s son who died at only 9 months. Katie thinks that Kandie was involved with his death, but Kandie claims she cared more for him than Katie did and even accuses her of selling him for $23 to her! Who’s responsible for the tragic death of the child?
Video.title: She Sold Her Baby for $23

Image.alt: She Sold Her Baby for $23
She Sold Her Baby for $23
She Sold Her Baby for $23

Video.summary: Ashley alleges that her fiancé John has repeatedly abused both her and her son. To make matters worse, this isn't John's first incident with abuse, as his former girlfriend, another Ashley, was also abused and is now here to save her friend.
Video.title: Will You Stay To Get Beat?

Image.alt: Will You Stay To Get Beat?
Will You Stay To Get Beat?
Will You Stay To Get Beat?

Video.summary: Erica kicked her boyfriend Martez out of their house and out of her life. But she’s willing to give him a second chance if he proves that he didn’t molest her 4 year old son! Then, Christy’s ex Stephen refuses to admit that he fathered her son!
Video.title: Single Mothers Get Results

Image.alt: Single Mothers Get Results
Single Mothers Get Results
Single Mothers Get Results

Video.summary: After finding porn and several email and text exchanges with transsexuals, Quintiqua is demanding that her boyfriend prove if he is bi-sexual or not! Then, Herb dug up proof in the form of pictures of Carl and a woman named Deanna online.
Video.title: Do You Have A Gay Double Life?

Image.alt: Do You Have A Gay Double Life?
Do You Have A Gay Double Life?
Do You Have A Gay Double Life?

Video.summary: Tasha wants to prove to her ex boyfriend Martin that he's the father of her 4 year old daughter. Martin's sister says that she thinks the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence because they had a threesome a year ago. Who's the real father?
Video.title: I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?

Image.alt: I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?
I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?
I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?

Video.summary: After causing Jasmine to have 4 miscarriages, she told Steve she was through with Tyrone.
Video.title: What If You’re Pregnant By Him?

Image.alt: What If You’re Pregnant By Him?
What If You’re Pregnant By Him?
What If You’re Pregnant By Him?

Video.summary: Deshawn claims that his ex Lynette has abandoned their 5 year old son.
Video.title: I'm Raising Him, but is He Mine?

Image.alt: I'm Raising Him, but is He Mine?
I'm Raising Him, but is He Mine?
I'm Raising Him, but is He Mine?

Video.summary: Katrina believes her sister Kendra’s boyfriend is a cheater and having sex with her best friend Nay-Nay! Later, John previously faced abuse allegations and has returned with a shocking update!
Video.title: This Should Be Explosive…

Image.alt: This Should Be Explosive…
This Should Be Explosive…
This Should Be Explosive…

Video.summary: Nicole thinks Sean openly cheats on her, but she's the one who gets the positive test result; Imani sports the promise ring from Charles, but she may have to return it after contracting a sexually transmitted disease.
Video.title: You Caught an S.T.D. Just Confess

Image.alt: You Caught an S.T.D. Just Confess
You Caught an S.T.D. Just Confess
You Caught an S.T.D. Just Confess
